articles.title: Positioning for a Big Move: SBUX Long Straddle Trade Idea
articles.summary: This article suggests a long straddle trade idea for Starbucks (SBUX) given its low implied volatility. The strategy involves buying both a call and a put option with the same strike price and expiration, designed to profit from a significant price movement in either direction or an increase in implied volatility. The author outlines the setup for a July 17th expiry straddle with a maximum loss of $1,000 and discusses risk mitigation strategies such as stop losses and position sizing.
